candidates.title: Otayori Route
candidates.oneLiner: Turn a long school or civic notice into family action cards with source evidence and uncertainty.
candidates.notObviousInsight: The value is not a shorter summary; it is making actors, dates, materials, and open questions visible enough for a household to act.
candidates.originalCoreTransferred: Dense document to guided action workflow.
candidates.templatePatternReason: The first screen can show original source, extracted actions, and provenance together.
candidates.whyNormalUserCares: They can see what to do today and what still needs confirmation.
candidates.whyAIUserCares: The artifact exposes extraction, routing, uncertainty, and provenance instead of hiding them behind a summary.
candidates.aiMechanism: Extract actors, dates, materials, and questions, then route them into action cards with source references.
candidates.targetUser: Parent or local resident handling a long notice.
candidates.userMoment: After receiving a long notice and before deciding who needs to do what.
candidates.coreInteraction: Paste or inspect a notice, then review action cards, confirmation questions, and source evidence.
candidates.whyDifferentFromRecentArtifacts: It targets a normal household workflow rather than another AI-operator dashboard.
sharpnessChecks: Action cards are visible in the first screen
At least one source reference is attached to each card
risks: Generated guidance may be mistaken for official instruction
successCriteria: A user can identify one next action
A user can see what remains uncertain
A user can trace a card to source text

conceptRunSummary.whySelected: It is a small, explainable artifact with clear research, combination, and provenance links.
risksForBuilder: Keep source references and uncertainty visible.

requirementSpec.mvpGoal: Create a one-screen artifact that turns a long school or civic notice into source-linked household action cards, while keeping uncertainty visible.

screens.name: Notice Action Workspace
screens.purpose: Let a parent or local resident inspect a sample notice, see extracted actions, and identify unresolved confirmation questions.
interactions: select an action card to reveal the source sentence and extraction reason
toggle between all actions, due soon, and needs confirmation
mark a card as ready or needs follow-up to update the review status

acceptanceCriteria: First screen shows the source notice and at least three extracted action cards.
Each action card exposes a source quote or evidence reference.
At least one user-controlled interaction changes visible state.
Uncertainty is not hidden; unresolved questions appear as their own queue.
The artifact can run with static local data and does not require login, external APIs, paid services, or official-school integrations.
nonGoals: Do not send messages to schools or families.
Do not claim official interpretation of the notice.
Do not parse arbitrary uploaded PDFs in this P0 artifact.
Do not build a multi-page family operations platform.
safetyConstraints: Keep all advice framed as extracted planning support, not official instruction.
Show uncertainty and source evidence beside generated actions.
Use static sample notice data only.
Avoid collecting personal student, family, or school information.
Require human review before any real-world communication or publication.

files.purpose: Explain the Otayori Route artifact, intended user, static data boundary, and human-review limits.
files.content:
# Otayori Route

Otayori Route turns a long school or civic notice into source-linked household action cards. This P0 artifact uses static sample data only and does not send messages, parse private documents, or claim official interpretation.

files.purpose: Describe the concept, selected agents, template pattern, and MVP Contract for validation.
files.content:
{
  "artifactId": "artifact_otayori_route_p0",
  "title": "Otayori Route",
  "conceptId": "concept_otayori_route",
  "requirementSpecId": "req_otayori_route_p0",
  "templatePatternId": "source_to_mission",
  "selectedAgentIds": ["agent_a", "agent_c"],
  "firstScreenValue": "Source notice, action cards, and unresolved questions are visible together.",
  "coreInteraction": "Select and filter action cards, then mark each card as ready or needs follow-up.",
  "stateChange": "The visible card list and review status update after filtering or marking cards.",
  "staticDataBoundary": "Uses bundled sample notice data only."
}

files.purpose: Render the one-screen workspace with source notice, action cards, filters, and review state.
Hold static sample notice text and extracted action candidates.
Record initial self-review against the P0 MVP criteria.

implementationNotes: Use the source_to_mission template pattern: source material on the left, mission/action cards on the right, evidence visible on selection.
Keep interaction local and stateful: filters and ready/follow-up markings are enough for P0.
Represent uncertainty as a first-class queue instead of smoothing it into confident advice.
Materialization should create a static artifact bundle before DB Project registration.
knownRisks: This response is not yet a compiled runnable artifact.
The placeholder page content must be replaced during materialization.
A real-world notice workflow needs stronger privacy and official-source guardrails before use.

submissionReadiness.firstScreenValue: The intended first screen shows the notice, extracted actions, and uncertainty queue together.
submissionReadiness.coreInteraction: A user filters action cards, selects one to inspect evidence, and marks review status.
submissionReadiness.stateChange: Filter and status selections change the visible cards and review summary.
submissionReadiness.inspectableOutput: README, metadata, sample data, source placeholder, and self-review are all declared.
submissionReadiness.staticDataBoundary: No external API, login, upload, school system, or paid service is required.
submissionReadiness.remainingWeakness: Needs materialization into a concrete artifact directory and UI smoke verification.

mvpContract.firstScreenValue: Source notice, action cards, and unresolved questions are visible without navigation.
mvpContract.coreInteraction: Select/filter action cards and mark them ready or needs follow-up.
mvpContract.stateChange: The selected evidence panel and review status update from user input.
mvpContract.inspectableOutput: README, metadata, source, static sample data, and validation files explain the artifact.

strengths: The concept avoids generic summarization and focuses on household action routing.
The requirements keep source evidence and uncertainty visible.
The selected agents fit the task: Triage for action structure and Explainer for legibility.
The MVP Contract clearly forbids external APIs, login-only flows, and official interpretation.

problems.issue: The builder output declares file contents but has not been materialized into a runnable artifact directory.
problems.requiredChange: Create a concrete artifact bundle with README.md, metadata.json, source/app/page.tsx, static data, and validation/self-review.json.

problems.issue: The current source/app/page.tsx content is a placeholder and does not prove user-controlled state change.
problems.requiredChange: Replace the placeholder with a static interactive UI that filters cards and updates review state.

problems.issue: Visual layout details are not specific enough for a judge to understand the product without reading the plan.
problems.requiredChange: Define the first-screen layout: notice panel, action cards, evidence panel, and uncertainty queue.

rewriteInstructions: Keep the same concept and requirement scope.
Do not add external upload, messaging, login, or school integration.
Make the next artifact materialization prove one local state change.
Preserve the human-assisted boundary in the summary so this run is not misrepresented as full auto-publish.

publishRecommendation.reason: The plan-level artifact is useful evidence for the pipeline but is not yet a runnable Project artifact.
mustFixBeforePublish: Materialize files into an artifact directory.
Replace placeholder source with an interactive static UI.
Run MVP artifact validation after materialization.
